_notice: Global annual CO2 emissions, IIASA SSP marker scenarios, 2025-2100. Source: IIASA SSP Database v2.0 (2018 release, AR6 marker scenario convention) — https://tntcat.iiasa.ac.at/SspDb. Variable: 'Emissions|CO2' (total CO2, fossil + AFOLU), Gt CO2/yr. Stored as decadal anchor points (2025, 2030, 2040, ..., 2100), linearly interpolated to annual values at load time (mapper.core.aesa_engine._expand_ssp_anchors). Provisional: best-estimate attribution to AR6 marker IAMs per scenario; refine against dense annual IIASA extracts before publication.
